headline: Incyte’s Pivotal frontMIND Trial Showed Tafasitamab (Monjuvi®/Minjuvi®) Combination Significantly Prolonged Progression-free Survival, Reducing the Risk of Disease Progression or Death by 25% in Patients with Previously Untreated, High-risk DLBCL
summary: WILMINGTON, Del., May 30, 2026--Incyte's frontMIND trial found Tafasitamab (Monjuvi/Minjuvi) combo significantly prolongs progression-free survival in high-risk DLBCL patients
